title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Syncing the scrolls
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just gave the API documentation a quick dust-off to keep everything perfectly in sync.
gist.summary: Automated synchronization of APIDOCS.md following a production deployment.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API documentation will see the most up-to-date OpenAPI specifications.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot organizing a tiny library or reading a scroll, with the bee mascot helping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head organizing glowing scrolls in a tiny wooden library. The small bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses hovers nearby, holding a tiny book. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
